titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding the Hajj of One Passing Through
Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding the Hajj of One Passing Through

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلرَّجُلُ يَمُرُّ مُجْتَازاً يُرِيدُ اَلْيَمَنَ أَوْ غَيْرَهَا مِنَ اَلْبُلْدَانِ وَ طَرِيقُهُ بِمَكَّةَ فَيُدْرِكُ اَلنَّاسَ وَ هُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ إِلَى اَلْحَجِّ فَيَخْرُجُ مَعَهُمْ إِلَى اَلْمَشَاهِدِ أَ يُجْزِيهِ ذَلِكَ عَنْ حَجَّةِ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ قَالَ «نَعَمْ».
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلرَّجُلُ يَمُرُّ مُجْتَازاً يُرِيدُ اَلْيَمَنَ أَوْ غَيْرَهَا مِنَ اَلْبُلْدَانِ وَ طَرِيقُهُ بِمَكَّةَ فَيُدْرِكُ اَلنَّاسَ وَ هُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ إِلَى اَلْحَجِّ فَيَخْرُجُ مَعَهُمْ إِلَى اَلْمَشَاهِدِ أَ يُجْزِيهِ ذَلِكَ عَنْ حَجَّةِ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ قَالَ «نَعَمْ».

segments:
Hadith.2885 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "A man passes through on his way to Yemen or another city, and his route takes him through Mecca. He finds people preparing to go out for Hajj, so he joins them and performs the rites. Does this suffice as the Hajj of Islam for him?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2885 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "A man passes through on his way to Yemen or another city, and his route takes him through Mecca. He finds people preparing to go out for Hajj, so he joins them and performs the rites. Does this suffice as the Hajj of Islam for him?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes."
